policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-ai-o04 - Disable custom content filters'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+AI+services#IncidentremediationAIservices#drcp-ai-o04 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP OpenAI Disable custom content filters
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents creating custom content filters. Disabling creation of custom content filters prevents DevOps teams from using other filters than the default ones.

metadata.description: Deny, Audit or Disabled the execution of the Policy
